name: cloudprice-mcp
summary: MCP server that compares cloud pricing across AWS, Azure, GCP, and OCI. 10 tools covering compute, block storage, object storage, managed Postgres, egress (with OCI 10TB-free shown), Multi-AZ workloads, and Reserved Instance / Savings Plan discounts. Ships with cloudprice-mcp setup auto-config CLI and doctor diagnostic command. OCI Always Free tier surfaced explicitly.
